This is the expected behavior and causes neither any functional failure nor reliability concerns to the device if the power-up or power-down sequence is followed. / For more details, refer to the Power Management User Guide: Agilex 3 FPGAs and SoCs and General-Purpose I/O User Guide: Agilex 3 FPGAs and SoCs. / For the power rail sharing, refer to the Power Supply Sharing Guidelines for Agilex 3 Devices section.
